svg.text: WAF Policy: Prevention Mode · SSL termination
delegation: Microsoft.Web/serverFarms · NSG: allow from gateway only
NSG: allow port 1433 from snet-appservice only
Public access: disabled · Private Endpoint only
NIC in snet-data · private IP 10.0.2.x · only path to Azure SQL · port 1433
No public internet route · traffic stays within VNet at all times
Log Analytics Workspace · App Insights ×2 · 3 Alert Rules · Action Group (email)
Azure Monitor · Diagnostic Settings · KQL · Metric Alerts
